shellCommands.command: ls src && find src -maxdepth 2 -type f | sort | head -80 && grep -R "renderCustomHeader\|monthsShown\|Calendar" -n src | head -80
sed -n '560,940p' src/calendar.tsx; sed -n '940,1235p' src/calendar.tsx
grep -n "render()\|return (\|dayNamesHeader" src/month.tsx | tail -20; sed -n '650,850p' src/month.tsx
grep -n "<Calendar\|monthsShown\|renderCustomHeader" src/index.tsx | tail -20

sed -n '1130,1210p' src/month.tsx; sed -n '1525,1625p' src/index.tsx; grep -n "renderPreviousButton\|renderNextButton\|renderMonths" src/calendar.tsx | tail -20; grep -n "react-datepicker__month-container\|__header" src/stylesheets/datepicker.scss | head -30

sed -n '1228,1260p' src/calendar.tsx; sed -n '60,105p' src/stylesheets/datepicker.scss; sed -n '200,230p' src/stylesheets/datepicker.scss; grep -n "static get defaultProps" src/index.tsx; sed -n '250,320p' src/index.tsx
grep -n "changeMonth\|increaseMonth\|decreaseMonth" src/calendar.tsx | head -20; sed -n '350,430p' src/calendar.tsx; cat package.json | grep -A8 scripts
sed -n '330,375p' src/calendar.tsx; sed -n '450,500p' src/calendar.tsx; sed -n '278,315p' src/index.tsx
grep -n "monthHeader\|renderPreviousButton\|renderNextButton" src/calendar.tsx src/month.tsx; corepack enable && yarn build

python3 - <<'PY' p='src/calendar.tsx';s=open(p).read() s=s.replace('renderPreviousButton = (\n date: Date = this.state.date,\n ): React.ReactElement | void => {','renderPreviousButton = (\n date: Date = this.state.date,\n localHeader = false,\n ): React.ReactElement | void => {') s=s.replace(''' const monthsToSubtract = this.props.showPreviousMonths ? monthsShown - 1 : 0;''',''' const monthsToSubtract = !localHeader && this.props.showPreviousMonths ? monthsShown - 1 : 0;''',1) s=s.replace('renderNextButton = (\n date: Date = this.state.date,\n ): React.ReactElement | void => {','renderNextButton = (\n date: Date = this.state.date,\n _localHeader = false,\n ): React.ReactElement | void => {') old=''' {this.renderCurrentMonth(monthDate)}
''' new2=''' {this.renderYearDropdown( this.props.monthHeaderPosition === "top" ? i !== 0 : false, )} {this.props.monthHeaderPosition !== "top" && this.renderNextButton(monthDate, true)} ''' s=s.replace(old2,new2,1) # For month dropdowns specifically i !==0 occurrences in default header s=s.replace(''' {this.renderMonthDropdown(i !== 0)} {this.renderMonthYearDropdown(i !== 0)}''',''' {this.renderMonthDropdown( this.props.monthHeaderPosition === "top" ? i !== 0 : false, )} {this.renderMonthYearDropdown( this.props.monthHeaderPosition === "top" ? i !== 0 : false, )}''') open(p,'w').write(s) PY npx prettier --write src/calendar.tsx corepack enable && yarn run eslint
corepack enable && yarn run eslint
corepack enable && yarn build

python3 - <<'PY'
p='src/calendar.tsx';s=open(p).read();s=s.replace('this.renderPreviousButton(monthDate, true)}','(this.renderPreviousButton(monthDate, true) ?? null)}').replace('this.renderNextButton(monthDate, true)}','(this.renderNextButton(monthDate, true) ?? null)}');open(p,'w').write(s)
PY
npx prettier --write src/calendar.tsx >/dev/null
corepack enable && yarn build >/tmp/build.log 2>&1; code=$?; grep -E 'TS[0-9]+|created|error' /tmp/build.log | tail -20; exit $code
git diff --stat && git diff -- src/calendar.tsx src/month.tsx src/index.tsx | head -80
git diff -- package.json
git checkout -- package.json && git status --short
rm -f AGENTS.md && git status --short && grep -n "renderDefaultHeader" -A35 src/calendar.tsx
corepack enable && yarn build >/tmp/build.log 2>&1; code=$?; grep -E 'TS[0-9]+|created|error' /tmp/build.log | tail -10; exit $code
